ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁶ : OrderBot ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝² : 𝓕.HasUsualConditions P
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX :
  @ProbabilityTheory.Locally ι Ω E mΩ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
    SubtractionMonoid.toSubNegZeroMonoid.toNegZeroClass.toZero
    (fun X => ∀ (ω : Ω) (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)) 𝓕 X P
⊢ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, ∀ (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)

      -- Obtain the localizing sequence and other properties from hX

      have h₃ : ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
        intro x
        have h₄ : ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto ((fun i => X i ω) : ι → E) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
          have h₅ : ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto ((fun i => X i ω) : ι → E) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
            intro x
            have h₆ : ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto ((fun i => (fun i : ι => (X : ι → Ω → E) i ω) i) : ι → E) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
              -- Extract the property from the localizing sequence
              have h₇ := hX (fun i => (fun i : ι => (X : ι → Ω → E) i ω) i)
              simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
              <;>
                aesop
            simpa using h₆ x
          simpa using h₅ x
        simpa using h₄ x
      exact h₃ x
    exact h₂
  exact h₁

filter_upwards [hX.ae] with ω hω
  intro x
  specialize hω x
  aesop

have h' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
      -- Extract the localizing sequence and the required properties from `hX`
      obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hτ'⟩ := hX
      -- Use the fact that the property holds for the stopped process to deduce it for the original process
      have h₂ : ∀ n ω, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x : ι => (X x ω : E)) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
        intro n ω x
        have h₃ := hτ' n ω
        have h₄ : ∀ ω, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x : ι => (X x ω : E)) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
          intro ω x
          exact h₃
        exact h₄ ω x
      -- Use the fact that the property holds for all n to deduce it for the original process
      have h₃ : ∀ ω, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x : ι => (X x ω : E)) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
        intro ω x
        have h₄ := h₂ 0 ω x
        exact h₄
      -- Use the fact that the property holds for all ω to deduce it for the original process
      filter_upwards [hX.eventually_of_isLocalizingSequence hτ] with ω
      intro x
      have h₄ := h₃ ω x
      exact h₄
    exact h₁
  exact h'

have h₁ := hX

  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    exact h₁.left_limit
  exact h₂

variable [LinearOrder ι] [OrderBot ι] {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  {mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω} {P : Measure Ω} {𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ} {X : ι → Ω → E}

lemma Locally.rightContinuous
    (hX : Locally (fun X ↦ ∀ ω, Function.RightContinuous (X · ω)) 𝓕 X P) :
    ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Function.RightContinuous (X · ω) := by
  have h₁ := hX

  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Function.RightContinuous (X · ω) := by
    exact h₁.rightContinuous
  exact h₂

obtain ⟨τ, hτ_is_localizing, hX'⟩ := hX
  have h := hX'.1
  have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [hτ_is_localizing.tendsto_top] with ω hω
    intro x
    have := hω.1 x
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := this
    refine' ⟨l, _⟩
    convert hl using 1
    <;> simp_all [Set.Iio]
    <;> congr 1
    <;> ext
    <;> simp_all [Set.mem_Iio]
  exact h₁

have hL := hX.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [hL] with ω hω
  intro x
  refine (hω x).imp fun l hlt _ ↦ ?_ |>.imp (by simp) fun hlt l hlt' ↦ ⟨l, hlt'⟩
  <;> simp_all [hω]
  <;> aesop

have h₂ : ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, ∀ (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    have h₃ := hX.tendsto_top
    filter_upwards [h₃] with ω hω x
    have h₄ := hω x
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := h₄
    refine' ⟨l, _⟩
    simpa [Function.comp] using hl
  exact h₂

have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ (s : { i : ℕ | ∃ (k : ℕ), k > i }), ∀ (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [hX.tendsto_top] with ω hω
    intro s x
    have h₂ := hω
    simp only [Filter.atTop_neBot] at h₂
    simp_all [Filter.Tendsto]
    <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all) <;>
    (try aesop)
  
  have h₂ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [h₁] with ω hω
    intro x
    have h₃ := hω ⟨0, by use 1 <;> norm_num⟩ x
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := h₃
    exact ⟨l, hl⟩
  
  exact h₂

have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [hX.tendsto_top] with ω hω
    intro x
    have h₂ := hω x
    simpa [Function.comp_apply] using h₂
  exact h₁

have h₁ : ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, ∀ (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x : ι => X x ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [hX.tendsto_top] with ω hω
    intro x
    have h₂ := hω x
    simpa [Function.comp_def] using h₂
  exact h₁
exact hX.rightClosedSet

have h₁ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    have h₂ : ∀ n (ω : Ω), ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
      intro n ω x
      have h₃ := hX.stoppedProcess n
      have h₄ := h₃ ω
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h₄ ⊢
      exact h₄ x
    have h₃ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
      have h₄ : ∃ Λ : ℕ → (ι → Ω → E), (∀ n, (fun X ↦ ∀ ω, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l)) (Λ n)) := by
        refine ⟨fun _ => (0 : ι → Ω → E), ?_⟩
        simp
        <;>
        (try
          {
            intros ω x
            refine ⟨0, _⟩
            simp [tendsto_const_nhds]
          })
      have h₅ : (∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l)) := by
        have h₆ : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
          filter_upwards [hX.eventuallyMeasurable] with ω hω
          exact fun x => h₂ 0 ω x
        exact h₆
      exact h₅
    exact h₃
  exact h₁

have hpX : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [hX.ae_exists_localizingSequence] with ω h
    obtain ⟨τ, hτ₁, hτ₂⟩ := h
    intro x
    have h₂ : ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
      have h₃ := hτ₂
      simp_all [Locally, isLocalizingSequence_of_isPreLocalizingSequence]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Filter.EventuallyEq]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
    exact h₂
  
  exact hpX
